label: Pawn column
description: Defines one column shown in pawn management tables such as the Assign, Restrict, Work, and Animals tabs.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# PawnColumnWorker subclass that implements this column's drawing and interaction logic. Defaults to PawnColumnWorker.

sortable.label: Sortable
sortable.description: If true, clicking the column header sorts the pawn table by this column's value.

ignoreWhenCalculatingOptimalTableSize.label: Ignore when calculating optimal table size
ignoreWhenCalculatingOptimalTableSize.description: If true, this column is excluded from the optimal table width calculation.

headerIcon.label: Header icon
headerIcon.description: Texture content path for the icon shown in the column header. Not a def reference - this is a path into the game's content directory.

headerIconSize.label: Header icon size
headerIconSize.description: Size override for the header icon as a 2D vector, e.g. (26, 26). If omitted, the icon uses the default 26x26 size.

headerTip.label: Header tip
headerTip.description: Tooltip shown when hovering the column header. Supports translation keys.

headerAlwaysInteractable.label: Header always interactable
headerAlwaysInteractable.description: If true, the header is always interactive even when sortable is false and headerTip is empty.

paintable.label: Paintable
paintable.description: If true, the player can drag across this column to assign or unassign all pawns in one gesture.

groupable.label: Groupable
groupable.description: If true, this column can be grouped with adjacent columns of the same type in the header.

trainable.label: Trainable
trainable.description: TrainableDef this column represents. Used by generated trainable columns such as Tameness and Obedience.

gap.label: Gap
gap.description: Pixel width of an empty gap column. Only meaningful for PawnColumnWorker_Gap columns.

workType.label: Work type
workType.description: WorkTypeDef this column represents. Used by generated work-priority columns such as Mining and Cooking.

moveWorkTypeLabelDown.label: Move work type label down
moveWorkTypeLabelDown.description: If true, the work type label is shifted downward in the column header. Generated work columns alternate this to stagger neighboring labels.

showIcon.label: Show icon
showIcon.description: If true, the pawn icon is shown inside this column's cell.

useLabelShort.label: Use label short
useLabelShort.description: If true, the column displays the pawn's short label instead of the full label.

widthPriority.label: Width priority
widthPriority.description: Priority used when distributing extra table width. Higher-priority columns receive additional width first. Can be negative.

width.label: Width
width.description: Fixed pixel width of this column. The default -1 means the column uses its worker's calculated preferred width.

basic-column.label: Basic column
basic-column.description: A column with a label and a custom worker class.

icon-column.label: Icon column
icon-column.description: A column with a header icon and tooltip, suitable for checkbox or icon-based display.
